content: TASK-012 interrupt done: comprehensive sample v2 now parses cleanly against its QIF intent (0 errors/warnings/suggestions, 2 inferred_flow infos). Next: resume TASK-008 nested zones/boundaries + dense rendering quality, including selected-element visual highlight, diagnostics-to-diagram focus, overlay conflict collapse/inspector handoff, and TASK-006 responsive re-fit follow-up if it fits the rendering-quality slice.
